discrepancies.reason: The 0.409 structural number and 0.158 Markov-reanalysis number come from different feature columns, different standardization/regularization schemes, and differently named target fields.  They should not share the bare name 'tree_geometry'.

gate_result: Phase 1 passes only after the ambiguous bare names are replaced by the recommended names. The fixed-m20 0.409 and 0.158 LOO R2 values are not contradictory because they are different regressions.

predictor_families.discrepancy_reason: Structural predictor set from regress_topology_results.PREDICTOR_SETS; compare only to rows with the same recommended_name, target, unit, and LOO scheme.
predictor_families.grouping_loo_scheme: Seed runs are aggregated by topology/mask cluster; group-level ordinary least squares uses one-row leave-one-out over those clusters.
predictor_families.regularization_or_standardization: OLS with intercept; non-intercept columns standardized once on the full design before leave-one-out scoring; no ridge regularization.
